# Soul Seeker Tarot

> Soul Seeker is a mystical tarot experience — draw cards, explore their meanings, and reflect on your journey through a cosmic, hand-crafted interface.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page introducing the Soul Seeker Tarot experience.
- [Introduction](/introduction): Overview of the Soul Seeker app and how the cards work.
- [Features](/features): What the Soul Seeker Tarot app offers.
- [About](/about): The story and philosophy behind Soul Seeker Tarot.
- [Contact Us](/contact): Get in touch with the Soul Seeker team.
- [Terms & Conditions](/terms): Legal terms for using Soul Seeker Tarot.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle your data.
